channel.title: Sujitha Sakthivel Portfolio
channel.description: Technical Writing Portfolio of Sujitha Sakthivel

item.title: Technical Implementation Guides
item.description: As a Technical Writer, I created implementation guides and user documentation by collaborating with developers and product teams. I focused on simplifying complex workflows and improving user experience through structured content and UI enhancements.

item.title: Improving README Documentation
item.description: A session focused on writing effective README files and improving developer experience through clear documentation practices.

item.title: Building an Online Portfolio
item.description: A workshop on creating and maintaining an online portfolio using modern documentation approaches and tools.

item.title: Product Documentation and Information Architecture
item.description: Worked on restructuring documentation and improving content organization for better usability and navigation.

item.title: API Documentation
item.description: Created API documentation, technical guides, and user-focused content to simplify complex integrations.
